requirements.md.description: The primary digital platform for local Ethiopian passport applications, document uploads, and biometric enrollment bookings.

fees.md.description: Fee schedule detailing standard, urgent, fast-track, replacement, and child passport pricing tiers.

faq.md.description: The official information hub of the ICS containing policy guidelines, renewal procedures, and validity rules.

appointment.md.description: Rules and criteria regarding biometric queue management, scheduling, and mandatory physical document packages.

payment.md.description: Standardized online payment protocol integration details (Telebirr, CBE Birr, and Derash/Flygate gateways).

office_info.md.description: Official contact directory containing headquarter locations, operating schedules, support desks, and national hotlines.

photo_requirement.md.source: Immigration and Citizenship Service (ICS) / Digital Invea
photo_requirement.md.description: Official biometric passport photo capture standards (dimension specifications, lighting, backgrounds, and facial criteria) utilized by both local and diaspora application portals.
